entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop, specifically hybrid BJ 104, used in the study

entities.name: WATER STRESS
entities.description: Lack of water availability affecting crop growth and yield

entities.name: MID-SEASON DROUGHT
entities.description: A specific period of water stress occurring in the middle of the growing season

entities.name: IRRIGATED
entities.description: Condition where water is supplied to the crop

entities.name: EXTENDED DAYLENGTH
entities.description: The use of longer light periods to manipulate the timing of floral initiation

entities.name: PHOTOPERIOD TREATMENTS
entities.description: Experimental manipulation of daylength to control crop development

entities.name: PANICLE INITIATION
entities.description: The stage when the panicle begins to form

entities.name: FLOWERING
entities.description: The stage when the crop produces flowers

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of grain produced per unit area

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD OF MAIN SHOOTS
entities.description: The amount of grain produced specifically by the main shoot of the plant

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD OF TILLERS
entities.description: The amount of grain produced by the tillers of the plant

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of grain yield to total biomass

entities.name: LEAVES
entities.description: The number of leaves per plant

entities.name: TILLERS PER PLANT
entities.description: The number of tillers produced by each plant

entities.name: LEAF AREA
entities.description: The total surface area of the leaves

entities.name: HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical growth of the plant

entities.name: TOTAL DRY MATTER
entities.description: The total biomass of the plant excluding water

entities.name: FLORAL INITIATION
entities.description: The process of transitioning from vegetative to reproductive growth

entities.name: PHYSIOLOGICAL STAGE
entities.description: The specific developmental phase of the crop

entities.name: PANICLE DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The growth phase of the panicle after initiation

entities.name: GRAIN FILLING
entities.description: The stage where seeds accumulate nutrients and grow

entities.name: ESCAPE MECHANISM
entities.description: A strategy to avoid stress by altering the timing of sensitive growth stages
